global.description: The ad features a warm orange background with a clear focus on food delivery services.
global.main_message: Order food with free delivery over $15.

elements.label: Solid orange background
elements.description: A vibrant solid orange background fills the entire canvas, providing a warm and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: CraveLoop logo
elements.description: The logo features the word 'CraveLoop' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Three food items
elements.description: Three stylized food items are depicted in a minimalistic outline, centered in the ad, suggesting variety.

elements.label: Hungry? We got you
elements.description: A bold, white text reads 'Hungry? We got you' in a large font, centrally placed to grab attention.

elements.label: Free delivery offer
elements.description: Smaller white text below the main message states 'Free delivery over $15', emphasizing the offer.

elements.label: Outline of food items
elements.description: An outline of food items is drawn in a simple style, adding a decorative touch to the center of the ad.

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom reads 'Order now' in bold white text, encouraging immediate action.
elements.text_content: Hungry? We got you Free delivery over $15

elements.label: CraveLoop branding
elements.description: The brand name 'CraveLoop' is displayed at the top in a clear, eye-catching font.

elements.label: Order now prompt
elements.description: A smaller text at the bottom prompts users with 'Order now', reinforcing the call to action.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main message in the center, and the CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Hungry? We got you, Free delivery over $15, CraveLoop, Order now
